value.fullName: Do not know the key decision maker(s) for the deal
value.label: Do not know the key decision maker(s) for the deal

value.fullName: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal
value.label: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal

value.fullName: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand some of their perceptions
value.label: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand some of their perceptions

value.fullName: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand their perceptions of the deal requirements, us, our competition
value.label: Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand their perceptions of the deal requirements, us, our competition
